mano_cua.result_summary: 无法测试。此旧 commit (4e78ee7b11) 使用已停服的 github-calendar.herokuapp.com REST API 获取贡献数据（非 GraphQL），API 请求超时无法生成图表。且此版本无前端 index.html，只有 /graph API 端点。与 case-16 完全相同的外部依赖问题。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: External API (github-calendar.herokuapp.com) is permanently offline. Cannot generate any graph to test axis label alignment.

deploy_notes: commit 4e78ee7b11. Express+nodemon on port 3000. herokuapp API unreachable - same issue as case-16.
